design_philosophy.visual_style: High-contrast dark mode with neon accents, glassmorphism, and smooth motion.
key_principles: Dark by Default: No light mode toggles. The atmosphere is always 'Night'.
Neon Guiding Lines: Use colored borders and glows to guide the eye.
Appetizing Darkness: Food photos must pop against matte black backgrounds.
Motion is Feedback: Interactive elements must glow or scale on hover.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Orbitron' for H1-H3. Uppercase for H1. Tracking-wide for 'Espace Maxo'.
usage_rules.body: Use 'Outfit' for all paragraphs, menu descriptions, and form inputs.
usage_rules.ui_labels: Use 'Rajdhani' for buttons, badges, and pricing.

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for section padding. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.
layout_strategies.containers: Max-width-7xl for main content. Full width for Hero sections.

grids.menu: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Cards with image top, text bottom.
grids.games: Asymmetric bento grid. One large feature (VR), two smaller (Simulators).

buttons.primary: bg-neon-blue text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all uppercase font-rajdhani rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: border border-neon-blue text-neon-blue hover:bg-neon-blue/10 transition-all uppercase font-rajdhani rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.booking: bg-neon-red text-white font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,60,0.5)] transition-all uppercase rounded-md

cards.style: bg-dark-card border border-white/10 hover:border-neon-blue/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/20 focus:border-neon-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-neon-blue text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 rounded-md

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use radial gradients for background glow: 'bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-neon-blue/20 via-transparent to-transparent'
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid with low opacity white. Active states get neon color.

motion.entrance: Fade in Up with stagger for lists.

hero.alt: Immersive VR Experience at Espace Maxo
hero.desc: Main hero background, dark overlay needed.

technical_instructions.images: Use the 'object-cover' class for all images. Ensure aspect ratios are consistent (e.g., aspect-video for games, aspect-square for food).
technical_instructions.mobile: Ensure the booking form is fully usable on mobile (no small touch targets). Use a sticky bottom bar for the 'Book Now' CTA on mobile.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.

do_not: Use default browser scrollbars (customize them to be thin and dark).
must: Use a global dark background class on the body tag.
Ensure text contrast meets accessibility standards (light grey on black).
Add hover states to ALL interactive elements.
